creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
Upstream has a fix but it may break build against hunspell < 1.5:
https://hg.mozilla.org/mozilla-central/diff/25c7efa29d66/extensions/spellcheck/hunspell/glue/mozHunspell.cpp
https://hg.mozilla.org/mozilla-central/diff/25c7efa29d66/extensions/spellcheck/hunspell/glue/mozHunspell.h
